lines.english: They wear and eat the gifts from the Lord;

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਸਿਉ ਆਲਸੁ ਕਿਉ ਬਨੈ ਮਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tis siau aalas kiau banai maae |1|
lines.english: how can laziness help them, O mother? ||1||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
Forgetting her Husband Lord, and attaching herself to other affairs,
the soul-bride throws away the precious jewel in exchange for a mere shell. ||1||Pause||
They consume food and drink, delicious and sublime as ambrosial nectar.
Forsaking God, she is attached to other desires.
But who has gained honor by saluting the slave? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਦੀਏ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਨ ਜਾਨਹਿ ਸੁਆਨ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jin dee tiseh na jaaneh suaan |3|
lines.english: But the dog does not know the One who has bestowed these. ||3||
Says Nanak, I have been unfaithful to my own nature.
Please forgive me, O God, O Searcher of hearts. ||4||76||145||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੇ ਚਰਨ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ਧਿਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: prabh ke charan man maeh dhiaan |
lines.english: I meditate on the Feet of God within my mind.
This is my cleansing bath at all the sacred shrines of pilgrimage. ||1||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਜਨਮ ਕੀ ਮਲੁ ਲਹਿ ਜਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kott janam kee mal leh jaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Thus, the filth of millions of incarnations shall be taken away. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਨੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har din har simaran mere bhaaee |
lines.english: Meditate in remembrance on the Lord every day, O my Siblings of Destiny.
and you shall obtain all the desires of your mind. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਕਥਾ ਰਿਦ ਮਾਹਿ ਬਸਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har kee kathaa rid maeh basaaee |
lines.english: Enshrine the Lord's Sermon within your heart,
Redeemed is the life, death and birth of those,
within whose hearts the Lord God abides. ||3||
who are blessed with the dust of the feet of the Holy. ||4||77||146||
Says Nanak, those humble beings are perfect,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਜੋਹਹਿ ਦੂਤ ਧਰਮ ਰਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tis no joheh doot dharam raae |1|
lines.english: The messengers of the Righteous Judge of Dharma shall hunt them down. ||1||
They eat and wear what they are given, but still, they deny the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਸਿਉ ਬੇਮੁਖੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਦੀਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: tis siau bemukh jin jeeo pindd deenaa |
lines.english: They are unfaithful to the One, who has given them body and soul.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
Such is the lifestyle of the faithless cynics;

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਜਨਮ ਭਰਮਹਿ ਬਹੁ ਜੂਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kott janam bharameh bahu joonaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Through millions of incarnations, for so many lifetimes, they wander lost. ||1||Pause||
everything they do is evil. ||2||
Who created the soul, breath of life, mind and body. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪ੍ਰਾਣ ਜਿਨਿ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਧਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jeeo praan jin man tan dhaariaa |
lines.english: Within their minds, they have forgotten that Lord and Master,
O Nanak, they are saved only by the Mercy of God, the Ocean of peace. ||4||
O Supreme Lord God, I have come to Your Sanctuary.
Their wickedness and corruption have increased - they are recorded in volumes of books.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੰਧਨ ਕਾਟਿ ਤਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ਦੂਜਾ ॥੭੮॥੧੪੭॥
lines.translit: bandhan kaatt tarai har naae |1| rahaau doojaa |78|147|
lines.english: Break my bonds, and carry me across, with the Lord's Name. ||1||Second Pause||78||147||
For their own advantage, they make God their friend.
Everyone should make Him such a friend.
He fulfills all their desires, and blesses them with the state of liberation. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੇ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaa te birathaa koe na hoe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: No one goes away empty-handed from Him. ||1||Pause||
all pain, suffering and disease are taken away. ||2||
For their own purposes, they enshrine the Lord in the heart;
So many times, Nanak is a sacrifice to Him;
fruitful is the Blessed Vision, the Darshan, of my Lord of the Universe. ||4||79||148||
Their tongues learn the habit of chanting the Lord's Name,
and all their works are brought to perfection. ||3||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
Millions of obstacles are removed in an instant,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੀਵਤ ਰਾਮ ਰਸੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਗੁਣ ਜਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: peevat raam ras amrit gun jaas |
lines.english: They drink in the sublime essence of the Lord's Name, the Ambrosial Elixir.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਣ ਮਿਟੀ ਖੁਧਿ ਤਾਸੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jap har charan mittee khudh taas |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meditating on the Lord's Feet, hunger is taken away. ||1||Pause||
for those who listen to the Sermon of the Lord, Har, Har, in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||1||
The treasure of all happiness, celestial peace and poise,
are obtained by those, whose hearts are filled with the Lord God. ||2||
